title: Ramble
description:
Ramble is a modpack which contains mods that enhance the casual Minecraft experience.
It will be updated with the newest version of Minecraft, as is possible with mod compatibility.
body:
_Ramble's purpose is to be a fun casual experiece for people who might be bored with vanilla Minecraft, adding new content but nothing too complex or difficult. Boot it up, throw on a movie, and relax._

I'll *try* to keep it updated with the newest version of Minecraft, as is possible with mod compatibility.

# Features
- **Crafting** - changes to crafting, streamlining certain processes
- **Terrain changes** - revamped terrain generation
- **Biomes** - tons of new biomes to explore
- **Structures** - new structures in the overworld and nether
- **Decoration** - lots of stuff to make your base look its best
- **Mobs** - new mobs to tame and hunt
- **Arms & Armour** - lots of customisation options for weapons, plus a few armour tweaks too
- **Performance Optimisation** - mods that make the game run smoother
- **Quality of Life** - small tweaks that just make sense
***
Here's a list of mods with their descriptions, cause I know when I play I enjoy being able to see what kinds of things are actually in a pack:

<details>
  <summary>Mods</summary>
  
 ## Main mods (needed on server and client)
- **[Areas](https://modrinth.com/mod/areas)** - allows the creation of custom named zones
- **[Blasting Clay and Clay Balls](https://modrinth.com/mod/blasting-clay-and-clay-balls)** - blast clay > terracotta and clay balls > bricks
- **[Blasting Netherrack into Nether Bricks](https://modrinth.com/mod/blasting-netherrack-into-nether-bricks)** - blast netherrack > nether bricks
- **[Blasting Raw Metal Blocks into Blocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/blasting-raw-metal-blocks-into-blocks)** - blast raw metal blocks > metal blocks
- **[bodacious berries](https://modrinth.com/mod/berries)** - adds a variety of berries and berry related things
- **[The Bumblezone](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-bumblezone-fabric)** - a dimension full of bees
- **[Chalk](https://modrinth.com/mod/chalk)** - adds chalk that can be used to mark your path
  - **[Chalk Colorful Addon](https://modrinth.com/mod/chalk-colorful-addon)**
- **[EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi)** - recipe browser
- **[Enchanted Vertical Slabs](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchanted-vertical-slabs)** - vertical slabs, woo!
- **[Extended Drawers](https://modrinth.com/mod/extended-drawers)** - adds drawers and other storage
- **[FastMove](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastmove)**  - parkour movement: dives, wall runs, and more
- **[Friends&Foes](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes)** - adds the mob votes that didn't make it
  - **[Friends&Foes - Flowery Mooblooms](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes-flowery-mooblooms-fabric)**
- **[Full Turtle Armor](https://modrinth.com/mod/full-turtle-armor)** - more than just a helmet
- **[Glassential](https://modrinth.com/mod/glassential-fabric)** - more glass!
- **[Grass Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/grass-overhaul)** - adds patches, slabs, stairs, and more
- **[Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)** - modern Hwyla/Waila replacement, shows what block you're looking at
- **[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)** - menu for configuring your mods
- **[More Doors](https://modrinth.com/mod/doors)** - new doors to make your base look pretty
- **[More Ladders](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreladders)** - ladders made of all the woods!
- **[More Music Discs](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-music-discs)** - adds 107 more music discs
- **[Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit)** - more biomes, blocks, and items
- **[No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports)** - makes chat unreportable
- **[Not Enough Recipe Book](https://modrinth.com/mod/nerb)** - removes the recipe book
- **[Polymorph](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymorph)** - no more recipe conflicts!
- **[Random Village Names](https://modrinth.com/mod/random-village-names)** - gives villages random names with Areas
- **[Realistic Bees](https://modrinth.com/mod/realistic-bees)** - reworks bees in many ways
- **[Reinforced Barrels](https://modrinth.com/mod/reinforced-barrels)** - adds barrels with more storage
- **[Reinforced Chests](https://modrinth.com/mod/reinforced-chests)** - adds chests with more storage
- **[Reinforced Shulker Boxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/reinforced-shulker-boxes)** - adds shulker boxes with more storage
- **[Ronco Record Vault](https://modrinth.com/mod/record-vault)** - bookshelves for music discs
- **[Snow! Real Magic!](https://modrinth.com/mod/snow-real-magic)** - snow gravity and accumulation
- **[spark](https://modrinth.com/mod/spark)** - performance profiler
- **[Sticky Enchanting Lapis](https://modrinth.com/mod/sticky-enchanting-lapis)** - lets your lapis stay in the enchanting table
- **[Thaumon](https://modrinth.com/mod/thaumon)** - Thaumcraft-inspired decoration blocks
- **[This Rocks!](https://modrinth.com/mod/this-rocks)** - rocks and stones
- **[Tool Trims](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tool-trims)** - over 1200 weapon and tool trims
- **[Travelers Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack)** - upgradable backpacks
- **[Trowel](https://modrinth.com/mod/trowel)** - place your blocks randomly
- **[Utility Belt](https://modrinth.com/mod/utility-belt)** - a second hotbar
- **[Visual Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/visual-overhaul)** - tweaks to vanilla visuals
- **[Waxable Coral](https://modrinth.com/mod/waxable-coral)** - let your coral breathe the air

### Performance mods (optional but RECOMMENDED)
- **[Clumps](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps)** - clumps XP orbs together for performance
- **[FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)** memory usage optimisation
- **[Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)** - addon for Sodium that adds support for Fabric Rendering API
- **[Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)** - modern shaders compatible with Optifine
- **[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)** - game logic/sever optimisation
- **[Reece's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)** - better options menu for Sodium
- **[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)** - fast rendering optimisation
- **[Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)** - more options for Sodium

### Optional mods (client-side, can be deleted)
- **[AmbientSounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds)** - nature sounds
- **[Appleskin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)** - adds food-related info to the HUD
- **[Better Mount HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-mount-hud)** - adds extra info while mounted
- **[Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes)** - provides support for Optifine, LabyMod, and MinecraftCapes capes
- **[Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads)** - shows player heads next to their messages in chat
- **[Client Commands](https://modrinth.com/mod/client-commands)** - useful client-side commands
- **[Client Sort](https://modrinth.com/mod/clientsort)** - lets you sort your inventories with the click of a button
- **[Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling)** - key bind menu search bar
- **[Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)** - Emissive, Random & Custom texture resource pack support
- **[Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)** - custom entity models for resource packs
- **[Entity Sound Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/esf)** - custom resource pack sounds
- **[GUI Followers](https://modrinth.com/mod/gui-followers)** - shows tamed non-sitting following mobs on your HUD
- **[Improved Sign Editing](https://modrinth.com/mod/improved-sign-editing)** - makes creating signs more pleasant
- **[Inventory Tabs](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-tabs)** - makes all nearby inventories have tabs in your inventory
- **[InvMove](https://modrinth.com/mod/invmove)** - lets you move while in an inventory, togglable
- **[Loading Screen Tips](https://modrinth.com/mod/loadingscreentips)** - fun tips while you load
- **[More Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory)** - more chat messages
- **[Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks)** - gives better inventory management by adding mouse functions
- **[Now Playing](https://modrinth.com/mod/now-playing)** - tells you what minecraft song is playing in the background
- **[Numerical Ping](https://modrinth.com/mod/numeral-ping)** - replaces the ping bars with a number
- **[Nvidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium)** - rendering addon for Sodium for Nvidia
- **[Remote Player Waypoints](https://modrinth.com/mod/remote-player-waypoints-for-xaeros-map)** - shows player postions on Xaero's maps
- **[Resourcify](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourcify)** - an in-game resource pack, shader pack, and data pack browser
- **[Too Many Binds Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/toomanybinds)** - simulate keybinds
- **[Xero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)** - amazing minimap
- **[Xaero's Worl Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)** - amazing worldmap, with waypoints!
- **[Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify)** - adds a zoom function

## Server-side mods (place these on the host PC, otherwise you can delete)
- **[Advanced Backups](https://modrinth.com/plugin/advanced-backups)** - server-side backups
- **[Advanced Shulkerboxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/advanced-shulkerboxes)** - lets you open shulkerboxes in your inventory
- **[Alternate Current](https://modrinth.com/mod/alternate-current)** - redstone reimplementation
- **[Better Spawn Control](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-spawner-control)** - disables mob spawners when surrounded by 5 torches
- **[Conduits Prevent Drowned](https://modrinth.com/mod/conduits-prevent-drowned)** - drowned wont spawn when in conduit power
- **[Cycle Paintings](https://modrinth.com/mod/cycle-paintings)** - cycle through painting options
- **[Death Backup](https://modrinth.com/mod/death-backup)** - backs up player inventories before death, loaded via command
- **[Double Doors](https://modrinth.com/mod/double-doors)** - opens double doors together
- **[Dynamic Lights](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dynamic-lights)** - adds emissive light to light sources
- **[Faster Random](https://modrinth.com/mod/faster-random)** - up to 100x* faster Random Generator
- **[Followers Teleport Too](https://modrinth.com/mod/followers-teleport-too)** - lets your follower pets teleport with you
- **[Formations](https://modrinth.com/mod/formations)** - new structures!
  - **[Formations Overworld](https://modrinth.com/mod/formations-overworld)**
  - **[Formations Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/formations-nether)**
- **[Just Mob Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-mob-heads)** - mobs can drop their heads
- **[Keep My Soil Tilled](https://modrinth.com/mod/keep-my-soil-tilled)** - keeps farmland tilled under melons and pumpkins
- **[Let Me Despawn](https://modrinth.com/plugin/lmd)** - tweaks mob despawn rules
- **[Moar Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/moar-advancements)** - new advancements!
- **[Name Tag Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/name-tag-tweaks)** - lets you change the look of name tags
- **[Nether Portal Spread](https://modrinth.com/mod/nether-portal-spread)** - the nether will spread around portals
- **[No Hostiles Around Campfire](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-hostiles-around-campfire)** - prevents mob spawns around campfires
- **[Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium)** - better worldgen performance
- **[Old Combat Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/old-combat-mod)** - no more swing cooldown
- **[Pl3x Map](https://modrinth.com/plugin/pl3xmap)** - a world map in your browser
- **[Quick Paths](https://modrinth.com/mod/quick-paths)** - create a path between points
- **[RightClickHarvest](https://modrinth.com/mod/rightclickharvest)** - right click to harvest and keep the crop planted
- **[Scaffolding Drops Nearby](https://modrinth.com/mod/scaffolding-drops-nearby)** - all scaffolding will drop in one pile
- **[Silence Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/silence-mobs)** - silce mobs with The Silence Stick
- **[Smaller Nether Portals](https://modrinth.com/mod/smaller-nether-portals)** - allows portals to be as small as 1x2
- **[Softer Hay Bales](https://modrinth.com/mod/softer-hay-bales)** - Assassin's Creed
- **[Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic)** - massively altered worldgen
- **[Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith)** - ~100 new biomes
- **[Tidal Towns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tidal-towns)** - floating villages
- **[Tree Harvester](https://modrinth.com/mod/tree-harvester)** - when you cut a tree with an axe, it'll fall down
- **[Universal Graves](https://modrinth.com/mod/universal-graves)** - makes a grave where you die with your inventory
- **[Veinminer](https://modrinth.com/datapack/veinminer)** - lets you mine a vein of ore all at once
- **[Villager Names](https://modrinth.com/mod/villager-names-serilum)** - gives names to villagers
- **[Where Is It](https://modrinth.com/mod/where-is-it)** - search of items in nearby inventoriess
- **[Wool Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/wool-tweaks)** - turn wool to string, dye placed wool, and more

- [kiwi](https://modrinth.com/mod/kiwi)
- [midnightlib](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightlib)
- [necronomicon](https://modrinth.com/mod/necronomicon)
- [owo-lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib)
- [placeholder-api](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api)
- [quad](https://modrinth.com/mod/quad)
- [qsl](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl)
- [resourceful-lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourceful-lib)
- [searchables](https://modrinth.com/mod/searchables)
- [silk](https://modrinth.com/mod/silk)
- [terrablender](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender)
